// Negative fixture for spec 120 R6 scan (g), round-8 call-site-keyed
// discriminator: the id operand hides in a NON-id-named variable.
// The site must still be flagged — classification is keyed by call
// site, never by operand names.
package fixture

import (
	"os"
	"os/exec"
)

func hiddenOperand() ([]byte, error) {
	x := os.Getenv("MINDSPEC_FIXTURE_TARGET") // an id, in a non-id-named var
	return exec.Command("bd", "show", x, "--json").Output()
}
